title: Gas consumption of natural persons (Valstybės duomenų agentūra)
description: [Publisher: Valstybės duomenų agentūra] The package contains data on the gas consumption of natural persons of the Energy Distribution Operator (ESO). Addresses are provided in rectangular stalls of 1 kilometre size in the Lithuanian coordinate system (LKS-94). Cells with 5 or fewer users are not displayed. Data time coverage: from 1 January 2019.
